test.create_query: CREATE TABLE keys64_build (a UInt32, b UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE keys64_probe (a UInt32, b UInt32) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE keys32_build (a UInt16, b UInt16) ENGINE = Memory
CREATE TABLE keys32_probe (a UInt16, b UInt16) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO keys64_build SELECT number, number FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO keys64_probe SELECT number % 10000000 AS k, k FROM numbers_mt(50000000)
INSERT INTO keys32_build SELECT bitAnd(number, 65535), bitShiftRight(number, 16) FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO keys32_probe SELECT bitAnd(number % 10000000, 65535), bitShiftRight(number % 10000000, 16) FROM numbers_mt(50000000)
test.query: SELECT l.a FROM keys64_probe AS l INNER JOIN keys64_build AS r ON l.a = r.a AND l.b = r.b SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'hash' FORMAT Null
SELECT l.a FROM keys64_probe AS l INNER JOIN keys64_build AS r ON l.a = r.a AND l.b = r.b SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash' FORMAT Null
SELECT l.a FROM keys32_probe AS l INNER JOIN keys32_build AS r ON l.a = r.a AND l.b = r.b SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'hash' FORMAT Null
SELECT l.a FROM keys32_probe AS l INNER JOIN keys32_build AS r ON l.a = r.a AND l.b = r.b SETTINGS join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash' FORMAT Null
